property.name: Lāmed - Terrace Cottage

location.distance_info: Fifteen minutes from Batroun Old Souk & five minutes from Batroun's famous wineries. Only a stone's throw away from the captivating Smar Jbeil Citadel. Step into history as you explore the historic square and immerse yourself in the rich heritage of the region.

property.description: Discover Lāmed Terrace Cottage at Beit Smar Boutique Resort your getaway hub in Batroun midlands. Lāmed features a luxurious king bed, cozy sofa bed, kitchenettes, & private patios with pergolas & outdoor seating - ideal for those who cherish independence & tranquility. Located in the picturesque midlands of Batroun, Lebanon, this boutique resort is nestled amidst the renowned vineyards of Batroun, offering breathtaking views of the Mediterranean Sea and a stone's throw from the vibrant Old Souk.
highlights: Luxurious Accommodation: King-size beds with fine linens, Dual rain showers for a spa-like experience
Stunning Views: Majestic sea and valley views from private patios, Perfect spots for enjoying sunrises and sunsets
Well-Equipped Kitchenettes: All the essentials for convenient self-catering
Prime Location: Minutes away from Batroun's historic Old Souk, Close to top wineries and local attractions
facilities: Pool access (May 15 to Oct 5, 9:00 AM - 7:00 PM)

additional_charge: Airport pick up and drop off

cancellation: 100% refund up to 14 days before arrival
50% refund up to 7 days before arrival
rules: Identity Cards are required by law at check-in.
Energy is scarce, close water taps and turn electric appliances off when leaving.
Treat the property as your own residence.
Please do not leave the key in the door lock; hand it to an agent at check out.
Park strictly in the designated parking area (avoid road/grass).
Pets are allowed in the Cottage, but NOT at the Clubhouse.
Hookahs/chicha are strictly prohibited on all the property.
Food and drink is prohibited in or near the pool area.
Bringing outside food or ordering food delivery is strictly prohibited.
